## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Explain the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred approach or API, if you have one in mind.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or examples here.
